getavgValueByPId.description: Gets an avgValue from 'v_votes' by its photo id
getavgValueByPId.sql: SELECT avgValue FROM v_votes WHERE photoId = $photoId LIMIT 1

deleteThisUserVotes.description: Deletes an existing entry in 'votes' by its primary key of the current user
deleteThisUserVotes.sql: DELETE FROM v_votes WHERE userId = $userId && photoId = $photoId
